name: Lord I Can't Even Walk
chorusText:
I thought that no one
would surely be me
I thought that I could be
what I wanted to be
I thought that I could be old
on life sinking sand
but I can’t even walk
without you holding my hand
Lord I can’t even walk
without you holding my hand
some mountains are too high
and the valleys too wide
but down on my knees
I’ve learned how to stand
Lord I can’t even walk
without you holding my hand
I thought that I could
do a lot on my own
I thought I could
make it all alone
I thought of myself
as a mighty big man
but I cant even walk
without You holding my hand
